suspicious_activity.narrative: Cindy Clayton (CUST_0057) exhibited suspicious activity indicative of money laundering. Multiple active accounts with high average monthly balances were noted. Transactions descriptions were inconsistent with high amounts, suggesting layering and integration. Notably, on 2025-07-31, three large ATM withdrawals totaling $17,932.36 were made at different branches, followed by two large cash deposits totaling $12,434.21 on 2025-08-01 and 2025-08-02.
key_indicators: Mismatch between transaction descriptions and amounts
suspicious_activity.ai_reasoning: Customer with high risk rating has multiple active accounts with high average monthly balances. Transaction descriptions do not match the high amounts, indicating potential layering and integration stages of money laundering.
